cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Offline RAG over vetted cassava agronomy records (FAO, IITA, and Nigerian extension material) to give smallholder farmers and extension workers grounded crop, pest, and disease advice with no internet.

test_prompts.prompt: My cassava leaves are turning yellow and curling near the top of the plant. What could be causing this and what should I do?
I want to plant cassava at the start of the rainy season in southeastern Nigeria. How should I prepare the land and space the stem cuttings?
